summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ School Management System updates: Teacher creation form with new fields, TenantsManagement page layout, and Backend API /api/users/create endpoint. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: - test_create_teacher_with_all_fields: Creates teacher with region, city, educational_department, school_name_ar, school_name_en
- test_create_teacher_minimal_fields: Creates teacher with only required fields
- test_create_platform_operations_manager: Creates platform operations manager role
- test_create_user_all_allowed_roles: Creates users with all 7 allowed roles
- test_invalid_email_format: Correctly rejects invalid email format (422)
- NEW FIELDS PRESENT: region, city, educational_department, school_name_ar, school_name_en
- REMOVED FIELDS VERIFIED: No department, status, notes fields in teacher form
- Region dropdown: Shows all 13 Saudi regions
- City dropdown: Dynamically populated based on selected region
- Educational Department dropdown: Shows departments for selected region
- 'إنشاء الحساب' (Create Account) button visible at step 4
- Step 2: User data form with all new teacher fields
- Step 5: Success screen with credentials display
- User successfully created in database via real API call
- 6-column grid: lg:grid-cols-6 class found for stats cards
- Combined stats card: Shows all school statuses (نشطة, إعداد, موقوفة, منتهية) in one card
- Larger Add School button: px-6 py-6 text-lg shadow-lg styling applied
- View toggle: Grid/Table view toggle buttons present
- Created user found in MongoDB with all fields:
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/wizards/CreateUserWizard.jsx - Fixed API call path from '/api/users/create' to '/users/create' (removed duplicate /api prefix)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All wizard steps and TenantsManagement features verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test teacher 'معلم اختبار الواجهة الكامل' with email 'teacher_full_test_1773077187@nassaq.com' via CreateUserWizard (REAL API - saved to database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User creation now uses REAL Backend API at /api/users/create. The API was tested with 11 pytest tests covering all scenarios. CreateUserWizard has 5 steps with new teacher fields: region (13 Saudi regions), city (dynamic based on region), educational_department, school_name_ar, school_name_en. TenantsManagement page has 6-column grid for stats cards and combined stats card showing all school statuses.

mocked_apis.note: User creation is now connected to real backend API - no more mocking

new_fields: city - Dynamic cities based on region

buttons_verified: إنشاء الحساب (Create Account) - visible at step 4

features: Combined stats card with all statuses
Larger Add School button (px-6 py-6 text-lg)

bug_fix_applied.issue: API call was using '/api/users/create' but axios baseURL already includes '/api', causing double prefix '/api/api/users/create'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed api.post('/api/users/create', ...) to api.post('/users/create', ...) in CreateUserWizard.jsx
